item.title: Treasuries Weaken Before Warsh Testifies for Fed Chair Role
item.author: Bloomberg News (English)
item.description: That points to policymakers staying on hold this year, with traders now pricing in roughly a one-in-three chance of a cut. “The challenge for a Trump nominee is they’re going to have to thread the needle between what the markets find credible and what Trump ultimately wants to happen,” said George Catrambone, head of fixed income at DWS Americas.
